case.title: ESTES EXPRESS LINES v. UNITED STATES

opinion.h1: ESTES EXPRESS LINES v. UNITED STATES, 394 U.S. 718 (1969)
opinion.h4: ESTES EXPRESS LINES ET AL. v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE EASTERN DISTRICT OF VIRGINIA. No. 1121. Decided April 21, 1969.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Griswold, Assistant Attorney General McLaren, Robert W. Ginnane, and Raymond M. Zimmet for the United States et al., and William H. Marx and H. Merrill Pasco for Railway Express Agency, Inc., appellees.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
